mapper.select: SELECT id, config_key, config_value, config_name, config_group, value_type, is_builtin, remark, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM jq_sys_config ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id, config_key, config_value, config_name, config_group, value_type, is_builtin, remark, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM jq_sys_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey} LIMIT 1
